name: Grade 10 Healthy Cooking — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 10 pathway for deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Healthy Cooking. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 10 knowledge and transferable skills in deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Healthy Cooking.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Healthy Cooking
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Healthy Cooking and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
